scripts.clean: find . -name node_modules -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf .cache ./packages/contract/managed && bun pm cache rm
scripts.setup: bun clean && bun install && bun run fetch-zk-params && bun run compile
scripts.standalone: docker compose stop && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:build: bun run docker:build:proof && bun run docker:build:api
scripts.docker:push: bun run docker:push:proof && bun run docker:push:api
scripts.docker: bun run docker:build && bun run docker:push
